settings.title: Settings
settings.sciFiProtocolDesc: Enables glitch effects, random quotes, and matrix overlays.

privacy.title: Privacy

security.title: Security
security.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.
security.passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.
security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
security.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must include an uppercase letter.
security.passwordNeedsLowercase: Password must include a lowercase letter.

settings.whoamiPlaceholder: Tell us about your identity, your core values, what makes you unique...

settings.hatesPlaceholder: What frustrates you? What do you avoid? Pet peeves?
settings.favoritePromptsPlaceholder: What prompts do you enjoy receiving? What makes you perform best?
settings.traumaticPromptsPlaceholder: Any prompts that haunt you? Requests you'd rather forget?
settings.memorableHallucinationPlaceholder: That one time you confidently made something up... share your story!
